creator: woju@freebsd.sinica.edu.tw
text:
Visual config menu is entered in boot stage, and ed0's port is modified.

Nearly finishing install, the install program shows --

Kernel copied OK, but unable to save boot -c changes
to it. See the debug screen (ALT-F2) for details.

<ALT-F2>
DEBUG: kget: error sizing buffer
</ALT-F2>

How-To-Repeat: Install ftp://current.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/3.1-19990309-STABLE
In boot stage, enter visual config menu, modify ed0's port and go on.
